title: Add 3 numbers
description: Practice adding 3 numbers. All numbers in these problems are 20 or less.

assessment_items.question_content:
At the "Under the Sea" talent show there were $7$ singing mermaids, $1$ conducting crab, and $10$ fish in the band.

**How many were in the talent show?**  
 [[☃ input-number 1]] 

Item| Number
- | - | -
Mermaids | $7$ 
Crab | $1$ 
Fish | $10$ 
$$

There were $2$ ducks, $1$ flamingo, and $1$ swan relaxing by the pond.

**How many animals were relaxing by the pond? **  
 [[☃ input-number 1]] animals

Item| Number
- | - | -
Ducks | $2$ 
Flamingo | $1$ 
Swan  | $1$ 
$$

Dad drives a car. Mom rides a bicycle. The baby rides a tricycle.

**How many wheels are on all the vehicles  ?**  
 [[☃ input-number 1]] wheels

Item| Wheels
- | - | -
Car | $4$ 
Bicycle | $2$ 
Tricycle | $3$ 
$$

I read $2$ books on Monday, $2$ books on Tuesday, and $1$ book today. 

**How many books have I read so far this week? **  
 [[☃ input-number 1]] books

Item| Number
- | - | -
Monday | $2$ 
Tuesday | $2$ 
Today  | $1$ 
$$

My best friend has $2$ dogs, $3$ fish, and $1$ cat.

**How many pets does my best friend have? **  
 [[☃ input-number 1]] pets

Item| Number
- | - | -
Dogs | $2$ 
Fish | $3$ 
Cat  | $1$ 
$$

Laila's hot air balloon has $5$ green stripes, $1$ blue stripe, and $3$ orange stripes.

**How many stripes does Laila's hot air balloon have?**  
 [[☃ input-number 1]] stripes

Item| Number
- | - | -
Green | $5$ 
Blue | $1$ 
Orange | $3$ 
$$

My sister went shopping and bought $4$ shirts, $6$ scarves, and $3$ necklaces.

**How many items did she buy? **  
 [[☃ input-number 1]] items

Item| Number
- | - | -
Shirts | $4$ 
Scarves | $6$ 
Necklaces  | $3$ 
$$

At the beach I saw $7$ seagulls, $5$ jellyfish, and $2$ dolphins.

**How many animals did I see at the beach? **  
 [[☃ input-number 1]] animals

Item| Number
- | - | -
Seagulls | $7$ 
Jellyfish | $5$ 
Dolphins  | $2$ 
$$

I went to my garden and picked $2$ carrots, $8$ onions, and $2$ radishes.

**How many vegetables did I pick? **  
 [[☃ input-number 1]] vegetables

Item| Number
- | - | -
Carrots | $2$ 
Onions | $8$ 
Radishes | $2$ 
$$

The zoo has $6$ meerkats, $3$ wild boars, and $2$ young lions.

**How many animals are at the zoo?**  
 [[☃ input-number 1]] animals

Item| Number
- | - | -
Meerkat | $6$ 
Wild Boar | $3$ 
Young lion | $2$ 
$$

In the magical forest, there were $5$ unicorns, $6$ dragons, and $6$ flying monkeys.

**How many animals were in the magical forest? **  
 [[☃ input-number 1]] animals

Item| Number
- | - | -
Unicorns | $5$ 
Dragons | $6$ 
Monkeys  | $6$ 
$$

At the Royal Ball, there were $9$ princes, $8$ princesses, and $2$ royal puppies.

**How many were at the Royal Ball? **  
 [[☃ input-number 1]] guests

Item| Number
- | - | -
Princes | $9$ 
Princesses | $8$ 
Puppies  | $2$ 
$$

I ate $1$ green jelly bean, $1$ orange jelly bean, and $1$ red jelly bean.

**How many jelly beans did I eat? **  
 [[☃ input-number 1]] jelly beans

Item| Number
- | - | -
Green | $1$ 
Orange | $1$ 
Red  | $1$ 
$$

The witch has $4$ monkeys, $5$ toads, and $1$ black cat. 

**How many animals does the witch have?**  
 [[☃ input-number 1]] animals

Item| Number
- | - | -
Monkeys | $4$ 
Toads | $5$ 
Black cat | $1$ 
$$

At the school bake sale, Grandma bought $4$ chocolate chip cookies, $2$ cupcakes, and $1$ donut.

**How many treats did Grandma buy? **  
 [[☃ input-number 1]] treats

Item| Number
- | - | -
Chocolate chip cookies | $4$ 
Cupcakes | $2$ 
Donut  | $1$ 
$$

Aya bought $6$ green crayons, $3$ blue crayons, and $7$ orange crayons.

**How many crayons did Aya buy  ?**  
 [[☃ input-number 1]] crayons

Item| Number
- | - | -
Green | $6$ 
Blue | $3$ 
Orange | $7$ 
$$

**How much money would you need to buy a goldfish, a fish tank, and fish food ?**  
$\$$ [[☃ input-number 1]]

Item| Price
- | - | -
Goldfish | $\$8$ 
Fish tank | $\$10$ 
Fish food | $\$2$ 
$$

**How much money would you need to buy a pack of markers, a page of stickers, and a coloring book?**  
$\$$ [[☃ input-number 1]]

Item| Price
- | - | -
Pack of Markers | $\$2$ 
Page of Stickers | $\$1$ 
Coloring book | $\$5$ 
$$

**How much money would you need to buy a doll, a set of blocks, and a board game?**  
$\$$ [[☃ input-number 1]]

Toy| Price
- | - | -
Doll | $\$4$ 
Set of Blocks | $\$5$ 
Board Game | $\$11$ 
$$

**How much money would you need to buy a bathing suit, a shovel, and a pail ?**  
$\$$ [[☃ input-number 1]]

Item| Price
- | - | -
Bathing suit | $\$12$ 
Shovel | $\$1$ 
Pail | $\$2$ 
$$
